summary: Deployed identity-core watchdog with 30s OIDC discovery probe and oauth2-proxy auto-restart on nginx-lv3. Added KC_CACHE=local to Keycloak to eliminate JGroups TCP loop from stale jgroups_ping rows.

verification.observed: lv3-identity-core-watchdog.service running and reporting OIDC discovery probe successful on 30s interval.
Keycloak container environment updated with KC_CACHE=local, eliminating JGroups TCP loop errors from stale jgroups_ping rows.

verification.check: oauth2-proxy watchdog timer active on nginx-lv3
verification.observed: lv3-ops-portal-oauth2-proxy-watchdog.timer running and configured to restart on unresponsive proxy.

notes: Root cause of 500s: Keycloak restart invalidated in-flight auth codes. The watchdog limits restarts to 6/hr maximum.
Deployed as part of nifty-clarke workstream (ADR 0376).
